articles.title: No Actual Concessions In US Response To Iran's Proposal To End War: Report
articles.description: In its proposal, Iran had called for an end of the war on all fronts.

articles.title: Kishan Reddy lambasts Telangana CM on electoral roll revision 'lies'
articles.description: Union Minister G Kishan Reddy criticized Telangana CM A Revanth Reddy over the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls, accusing the Congress party of engaging in 'false propaganda' and attempting to incite communities over the issue.

articles.title: TN Speaker lauds CM Vijay as different kind of political leader
articles.description: TN Speaker lauds CM Vijay as different kind of political leader

articles.title: Tommy Robinson’s ‘Unite The Kingdom’ Rally Explodes As Sick Charlie Kirk Chant Shocks London | WATCH
articles.description: A horrifying chant referencing conservative commentator Charlie Kirk stunned onlookers during chaotic London protests as rival demonstrations flooded the streets. Thousands joined Tommy Robinson’s ‘Unite The Kingdom’ rally while pro-Palestinian protesters marked Nakba Day, forcing a massive police deployment across the capital.

articles.title: CM-Designate Satheesan Unveils Kerala Cabinet Ahead Of Oath-Taking: Check Full List Of Ministers
articles.description: VD Satheesan unveils Kerala cabinet, keeps finance. Ramesh Chennithala gets home department. Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan elected as Assembly Speaker.

articles.title: Yatnal says he will counter hijab with saffron shawls, tilak
articles.description: Basanagouda Patil Yatnal opposes hijab in schools, promoting saffron shawls and challenging Siddaramaiah on fuel price promises.

articles.title: How the Iran war has crippled one of world's richest nations
articles.description: For years, Qatar projected itself as a symbol of stability in a volatile region. Images of air raid sirens in Doha and missile strikes near critical gas infrastructure have now challenged that perception globally.

articles.title: Consumer body seeks removal of advertisements of ‘sponsors’ on traffic signals in Coimbatore
articles.description: Consumer body urges Coimbatore officials to remove traffic signal advertisements, citing road safety violations and potential court action.

articles.title: Iran hands fresh proposal to Pakistan as Islamabad intensifies mediation between Tehran and Washington
articles.description: Iran handed Pakistan a revised negotiation proposal blending US demands and Iranian conditions, as Islamabad intensified mediation efforts to revive stalled Tehran-Washington peace talks amid regional tensions.

articles.title: From uranium transfer to frozen assets, US sets 5 conditions in response to Iran’s proposal
articles.description: From uranium transfer to frozen assets, US sets 5 conditions in response to Iran’s proposal

articles.title: Maharashtra MLC attendance: Ex-CM Uddhav Thackeray logs 31% in 4 years; two members skip 3 sessions
articles.description: Maharashtra MLC attendance: Shiv Sena UBT chief Uddhav Thackeray attended 42 of 133 legislative council sittings in four years. Data also showed Bhavana Gawali and Ramraje Naik-Nimbalkar skipped three sessions since 2024.

articles.title: Inside NEET leak probe: How questions moved from NTA panel to students
articles.description: Officials said the breach did not remain confined to classrooms. Instead, handwritten notes allegedly generated during coaching sessions were converted into a large PDF file containing hundreds of questions.

articles.title: Iran exacts heavy price from US & Arabs, only special ships to pass Hormuz
articles.description: Iran rolls out a new “Hormuz Safe” system to control shipping routes and restrict access in the Strait of Hormuz. With a key U.S. carrier now out of the region, fears grow over Tehran’s expanding influence on global oil transit.

articles.title: Can Pak Interior Minister Naqvi’s Tehran Visit Revive Iran-US Peace Talks? Exclusive
articles.description: Mohsin Naqvi is expected to hold meetings with senior Iranian officials during the visit to cover both bilateral security matters and the wider regional situation

articles.title: From the Opinions Editor: It’s not tariffs, AI play, or energy imports that keep investors away. India lacks a growth story
articles.description: The India growth story cannot be one that is propped up by government spending alone. Private investment isn’t soaring. Domestic consumption isn’t growing fast enough simply because jobs and income growth has been muted

articles.title: Great Nicobar project: Jairam Ramesh writes to Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, suggests defence alternatives
articles.description: In his letter, Jairam Ramesh outlined several alternative options for developing defence infrastructure in the island region.

articles.title: 'Rajini is not a cheap or low-standard person': Rajinikanth hits back at critics over meeting with defeated MK Stalin
articles.description: Superstar Rajinikanth addressed election-time rumors at a press meet, clarifying his meeting with MK Stalin was a friendly gesture, not political. He emphasized his departure from politics and expressed surprise at Vijay's independent political rise, noting their significant age difference. Rajinikanth aims to prevent personal actions from being misconstrued politically.

articles.title: PMK's Anbumani urges TVK govt to grant regular employment for Tamil Nadu home guards
articles.description: PMK leader Dr Anbumani Ramadoss on Sunday urged the TVK government to take immediate steps to grant home guards regular employment with timely and appropriate monthly pay.

articles.title: FIR registered over anti-Rahul, Priyanka Gandhi posters in Wayanad: ‘Kerala will never forgive’
articles.description: One of the posters read: “Mr Rahul, KC might be your bag bearer, but people of Kerala will never forgive you.” Another warned: “Wayanad will be next Amethi.”

articles.title: 'Lack of understanding': Indian diplomat fires back at Dutch journalist's questions on press freedom and minorities
articles.description: MEA Secretary West Sibi George said questions on press freedom and minorities reflected a “lack of understanding”, citing India’s religious diversity, elections and democratic system.

articles.title: Supreme Court Judge Strength Raised From 33 To 37 To Reduce Pendency
articles.description: Union Minister of State for Law and Justice Arjun Ram Meghwal announced the development

articles.title: Maduro’s ‘bag man’ sent to US as Venezuela deports Alex Saab in dramatic U-turn
articles.description: Rest of World News: Venezuela has deported businessman Alex Saab, a close ally of former president Nicolas Maduro who is facing multiple criminal investigations in the Un.

articles.title: Watch: How was ISIS second-in-command Abu-Bilal al-Minuki killed in joint US-Nigerian military operation
articles.description: According to US authorities, al-Minuki served as a senior leader within ISIS’s General Directorate of Provinces, the body responsible for supervising the group’s international branches and operations.

articles.title: Ladakh LG launches self-enumeration portal for Census 2027
articles.description: Ladakh's Census 2027 has begun with the launch of a self-enumeration portal. Lieutenant Governor Vinai Kumar Saxena initiated the process, urging citizens to participate. This exercise is crucial for policy making and resource allocation. The census will help reflect Ladakh's unique identity and needs in national planning. Digital integration and data security are key features of this census.

articles.title: In Jerusalem, Palestinians are being forced to tear down their own houses for a park project
‘Have list of Abhishek Banerjee’s properties’: Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari in fresh attack on TMC MP
articles.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has claimed to possess a list of properties linked to Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee's company, Leaps and Bounds, vowing a thorough investigation. This escalation follows an FIR against Banerjee for alleged inflammatory remarks, which TMC leader Tanmoy Ghosh decried as politically biased and selective, questioning the targeting of Banerjee post-election losses.

articles.title: CM Vijay's closure of TASMAC shops a major achievement: Sengottaiyan
articles.description: Finance Minister KA Sengottaiyan hailed CM Joseph Vijay's decision to close 717 TASMAC liquor outlets near schools and temples as a major achievement for the newly formed TVK government in Tamil Nadu, which recently allocated cabinet portfolios.

articles.title: CM Yogi addresses grievances, fills digital census form in Gorakhpur
articles.description: CM Yogi Adityanath addressed public grievances at 'Janta Darshan' in Gorakhpur and participated in the digital census. He also highlighted plans for a new 30,000-seat international cricket stadium and an adjoining sports complex in the city.

articles.title: FIR against Abhishek Banerjee: TMC cries foul, calls it 'selective'
articles.description: TMC leader Tanmoy Ghosh condemned an FIR against Abhishek Banerjee for alleged inflammatory remarks as 'selective' and 'unacceptable'. The FIR cites provocative speeches by Banerjee at rallies, inciting violence and disturbing public tranquillity.

articles.title: Himachal Pradesh civic polls 2026: Voting underway for 51 bodies
articles.description: Polling is underway for 51 urban local bodies in Himachal Pradesh, including the four Municipal Corporations of Dharamshala, Palampur, Mandi, and Solan. Voting began at 7 AM for over 3.6 lakh eligible voters and will continue until 3 PM.

articles.title: India, Netherlands elevate ties, boost cooperation across key sectors: MEA
articles.description: MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George said both sides welcomed the strong momentum in bilateral relations and discussed expanding cooperation in several emerging and strategic areas

articles.title: 'Shoot Him in the Neck Like Charlie Kirk': Chant at London Protest Sparks Outrage
articles.description: A deeply disturbing chant calling for Tommy Robinson to be killed "like Charlie Kirk" was caught on video during London protests Saturday, where two separate rallies drew enormous crowds and a police force of 4,000 officers.

articles.title: Who Is Alex Saab? Nicolas Maduro’s 'Bag Man' Deported to US
articles.description: Venezuela has deported businessman Alex Saab to the United States, less than three years after he was pardoned by former President Joe Biden.

articles.title: ‘Not Against Iran...’: US Ally UAE ‘Pleads’ For Putin’s Help After IRGC’s FINAL ‘WARNING SHOTS’
articles.description: While the U.S. and Israel navigate a volatile military standoff with Iran, Vladimir Putin is playing the ultimate diplomatic card. In a critical phone call, UAE President Mohammed bin Zayed personally assured Putin that Emirati territory is not being used to launch attacks against Iran. With UAE infrastructure taking a brutal beating from Iranian retaliatory strikes, Putin has offered to act as a direct backchannel messenger to Tehran. As Washington beats the drums of war, Moscow is proving it’s the only major power that can still speak to all sides. Watch the analysis.

articles.title: If Pak continues to harbour terrorists, it has to decide if it wants to be part of geography or history: Army chief
articles.description: If Pak continues to harbour terrorists, it has to decide if it wants to be part of geography or history: Army chief

articles.title: NEET paper leak: KC Venugopal demands Education Minister's resignation
articles.description: Congress MP KC Venugopal demands the Education Minister's resignation over the NEET paper leak. The CBI has arrested the kingpin, a chemistry lecturer. Nationwide protests continue, demanding a fair probe and systemic reforms in examinations.

articles.title: Trump insider Laura Loomer slams Thomas Massie over shock Cynthia West claims as Rep Randy Fine steps into fray
articles.description: Laura Loomer accused Thomas Massie of hiding misconduct while criticizing Trump.

articles.title: Bill Belichick’s girlfriend Jordon Hudson questions why major sports media outlets continue ignoring the Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini scandal
articles.description: Jordon Hudson has renewed criticism of major NFL media outlets over their handling of the Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini controversy. Hudson argues that networks aggressively covered her relationship with Bill Belichick while avoiding detailed discussion about allegations involving Vrabel and Russini. Her comments gained traction after she reposted a montage highlighting media reluctance to address the story. The debate has now expanded into broader questions about consistency, newsroom priorities, and double standards in NFL coverage.

articles.title: Karnal: Proud of BJP workers’ devotion to party, says Saini

articles.title: 'War Grave, Not Tourist Spot': FBI Chief Kash Patel Slammed Over Pearl Harbor Snorkel Trip
articles.description: Kash Patel has faced backlash from veterans and former law enforcement for participating in a private snorkeling trip near the USS Arizona at Pearl Harbor, a site honoring over 900 servicemen from the 1941 attack.

articles.title: UDF govt remote-controlled by dangerous forces: Keralam BJP chief
articles.description: Keralam BJP chief Rajeev Chandrashekhar slammed the UDF's election victory, claiming it was built on false promises. He vowed to monitor the new government for being 'remote controlled' by 'dangerous forces' like Jamaat-e-Islami and SDPI.

articles.description: The DGP Headquarters has mandated strict compliance with its 2023 social media policy to curb objectionable content by personnel.
